checked.note: verified in a running system - human live check 2026-07-20 following the interaction checklist (all listed checks passed)

deviations.what: the ObjectStatus state values Indication06-Indication08 (since UI5 1.75) and Indication09-Indication20 (since UI5 1.120) are newer than 1.71 but kept for the 1:1 port - the app needs a UI5 release >= 1.120 to render them all (>= 1.75 for Indication06-Indication08).

the active status press opens the controller-built Dialog 1:1 (core:FragmentDefinition + popup_display): the Dialog with its VBox, the two content Texts (one EXTRA Text vs the original view) and the Close Button are EXTRA controls vs the archived view.xml, which only holds the ObjectStatus rows. Confirmed working in the 2026-07-20 live check.
